meta_text: Ranked benchmark results grouped by environment configuration, task configuration, and traffic network
hero_text: URB benchmarks routing policies for mixed traffic with human drivers and connected autonomous vehicles (CAVs). The table below indexes experiment folders under results/ and ranks runs by benchmark metrics.
controls_hint: Click a row to mark it, then use Isolate to focus on selected runs.
filters_hint: Select one or more values per group. Click a column header to sort.
filter_empty: No runs match the current filters.
footer_hint: Generated from local results at build time.

metric_descriptions.t_pre: \(\hat{t}^{pre}\) Average travel time before CAV introduction (all agents, minutes).
metric_descriptions.t_test: \(\hat{t}^{test}\) Average travel time in the testing phase (all agents, minutes).
metric_descriptions.t_train: \(\hat{t}^{train}\) Average travel time in the training phase (all agents, minutes).
metric_descriptions.t_CAV: \(\hat{t}_{CAV}\) Average CAV travel time in the testing phase (minutes).
metric_descriptions.t_HDV_pre: \(\hat{t}^{pre}_{HDV}\) Average human-driver travel time before CAV introduction (minutes).
metric_descriptions.t_HDV_test: \(\hat{t}^{test}_{HDV}\) Average human-driver travel time in the testing phase (minutes).
metric_descriptions.CAV_advantage: \(\hat{t}^{test}_{HDV}/\hat{t}_{CAV}\) Relative CAV advantage; values > 1 favor CAVs.
metric_descriptions.Effect_of_change: \(\hat{t}^{pre}_{HDV}/\hat{t}_{CAV}\) Effect of changing from human-driving baseline to CAV policy.
metric_descriptions.Effect_of_remaining: \(\hat{t}^{pre}_{HDV}/\hat{t}^{test}_{HDV}\) Effect of remaining with human drivers.
metric_descriptions.avg_speed_pre: \(\bar{v}^{pre}\) Average speed before CAV introduction (km/h, SUMO).
metric_descriptions.avg_mileage_pre: \(\bar{\ell}^{pre}\) Average route length before CAV introduction (km, SUMO).
metric_descriptions.avg_mileage_test: \(\bar{\ell}^{test}\) Average route length in testing (km, SUMO).
metric_descriptions.winrate: Win indicator for a run: 1 if CAV travel time is lower than pre-mutation baseline, else 0.
metric_descriptions.cost_of_learning: \(c\) Average training cost across all agents (minutes).
metric_descriptions.cost_of_learning_humans: \(c_{HDV}\) Average training cost for human drivers (minutes).
metric_descriptions.avg_time_lost: \(\bar{\Delta t}\) Average time lost after mutation across all agents (minutes).
metric_descriptions.avg_human_time_lost: \(\bar{\Delta t}_{HDV}\) Average human-driver time lost after mutation (minutes).
metric_descriptions.avg_CAV_time_lost: \(\bar{\Delta t}_{CAV}\) Average CAV time lost after mutation (minutes).
metric_descriptions.diff_sumo_routerl: \(t_{SUMO} - \hat{t}^{test}\) SUMO mean trip duration minus RouteRL test travel time.
